title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 632.560 - Mental health care provider requirements
text:
632.560.  Mental health care provider requirements. — 1.  As used in this section, "mental health care provider" means any person licensed pursuant to chapter 334, chapter 335, or chapter 337.
  2.  To provide repressed memory therapy, recovered memory therapy, reparenting therapy or multiple personality disorder treatment, a person shall be a mental health care provider as defined in subsection 1 of this section.
(L. 1999 H.B. 343 § 1)
